title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: Terminal-first local search and AI chat over your documents, code, and crawled websites. Semantic + hybrid search, vision OCR, auto-built wiki, browsable GGUF model catalog. Works as CLI, TUI, MCP server, REST API, or Python library. Offline by default, no sidecar services.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: marcossangomes/SmartLLM-Router
summary: 🔍 Optimize LLM requests by routing them to the best models, while leveraging semantic caching and real-time cost analytics for efficient resource use.

title: greg-gzillion/clawpack_v2
summary: 🦞 Unified AI Agent Ecosystem with Common Chronicle-inspired knowledge indexing. 15+ specialized agents for documents, diagrams, blockchain, math, translation, and more.

title: afterthings7/local-ai-stack
summary: 🔍 Build local AI infrastructure on M2 MacBook Air with zero cloud dependencies, ensuring unlimited usage and complete privacy.

title: Namanpaliyal/KardiaFlow
summary: 🚀 Build and deploy a lightweight RAG demo using FastAPI, Chroma, and Ollama LLM for efficient AI-assisted information retrieval.

title: augur-os/augur-os
summary: Local-first personal AI OS. 200+ composable skills. Any model. Plain text. Yours forever.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Memory-first Rust AI agent for long-running work. Temporal graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model cascade routing. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF · TEE. MCP + ACP + A2A. Sub-agents. One binary.

title: arq105/llm-speech-summarization
summary: 📘 Summarize speeches and documents swiftly with advanced techniques using LangChain and Groq's fast Llama models for efficient content insights.

title: redblac/web-youtube-summarizer-llm
summary: 📝 Summarize any YouTube video or website URL effortlessly using LangChain and Groq Llama models for clear, concise insights.

title: franck-bedis/langchain-sql-agent
summary: 📊 Chat with your SQL database using LangChain and Groq LLaMA 3.1. Easily ask questions and get instant answers with auto-generated SQL queries.

title: sriinnu/kosha-discovery
summary: Discovery registry for AI models, credentials, and pricing across local and cloud providers. Library, CLI, and HTTP API.

title: code-vygr/local-llm-ocr-ollama
summary: 🖼️ Extract text from images locally using Ollama's LLMs—100% free, offline, and private. No API keys or cloud costs necessary.

title: Keel-Labs/keel
summary: An AI assistant whose memory belongs to you. Local-first Mac app, plain markdown workspace, bring your own model.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: 09sulka/API-4-Your-AI
summary: 🤖 Build and deploy OpenAI-compatible local FastAPI endpoints with SQL Server 2025 AI integration for seamless AI workflows and secure connections.

title: owusuarko/ReconFusionAi
summary: 🔍 Detect exposed secrets and vulnerabilities across web apps with ReconFusionAI's advanced scanning and AI-powered contextual analysis.

title: h3rb3rn/moe-sovereign
summary: Self-hosted Compound AI System for sovereign environments. Features token-saving complexity routing, deterministic MCP tools for math/logic, configurable expert templates, causal/reinforcement learning, agentic loops, and a federated Neo4j GraphRAG.

title: rexnzm/MCP-rag-with-Chromadb
summary: 🗂️ Build a versatile MCP server with RAG capabilities, supporting multiple document formats using LangChain and ChromaDB for efficient data retrieval.
